title: galium verum var. consanguineum
intro: Galium verum var. consanguineum, also known as Yellow Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Galium verum var. consanguineum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
